title: Fix self-improver execution rollback and pending listing
reason: The self-improver is currently unreliable because its execution function is truncated and routes call a missing pending() function. Completing execution with rollback, delete support, and a real pending() list directly improves self-improver quality, approval safety, and overall system reliability.

title: Add API key protection and richer health status
reason: Self-improver approval and execution endpoints are currently open, which is risky for monetization readiness and production reliability. Adding optional API key protection plus a health endpoint that reports output and proposal counts makes the system safer to operate and easier to commercialize.

title: Protect self-improver routes with typed validation
reason: The self-improver propose/approve/execute flow currently accepts raw dicts and wildcard imports, which weakens reliability and operator safety. Strong request models and centralized API-key gating improve user flow for operators, reduce malformed proposals, and make the system safer for paid deployment.

title: Fix self-improver execution reliability and add pending proposals support
reason: The self-improver is currently broken in a high-impact path: routes call a pending() function that does not exist, and execute() is truncated, making approval-to-apply unreliable. Fixing this directly improves self-improver quality, operational reliability, and trust in the product's core improvement loop.

title: Add API key gate and real base URL generation for monetization-safe output links
reason: The product currently has open founder/self-improver control surfaces and returns empty base URLs, which hurts security, monetization readiness, and shareable output quality. A simple optional API key gate plus environment-aware base URL generation is realistic, approval-safe, and immediately valuable for deployments and paid access control.

title: Repair and harden the self-improver execution engine
reason: The self-improver is currently unreliable because its execution flow is visibly truncated, verify() always passes, and route handlers depend on functions that do not exist. Fixing this directly improves self-improver quality, safety, and system reliability while keeping changes realistic and approval-safe.

title: Add API key gating and proper base URL generation
reason: The current API is fully open with wildcard CORS and empty base URLs, which hurts monetization readiness, deployment quality, and product output usability. A lightweight API key check for generation endpoints plus environment-based file URLs makes the product safer to expose and easier to sell.

title: Improve frontend user flow with a working generation console
reason: The repo has an app frontend but no visible generation flow in the provided snapshot. Adding a simple page that can create jobs, poll status, and show gallery output dramatically improves user flow, perceived product quality, and readiness for demos or paid access without requiring new backend architecture.

title: Add safe API schemas and proper self-improver route responses
reason: The current self-improver routes use raw dict input, wildcard imports, and always return ok=true for approve/reject even when IDs do not exist. Tightening this improves reliability, approval safety, and user flow while making the self-improver easier to monetize as a trustworthy admin feature.

title: Make generated asset URLs production-ready and improve API health metadata
reason: The API currently returns empty base URLs, which weakens product usability and monetization readiness because generated outputs cannot reliably link back to hosted files. Adding a real base URL resolver and richer health info improves user flow, deployment readiness, and downstream product quality.

title: Fix self-improver execution reliability and add pending listing
reason: The self-improver is currently unsafe to use because its executor file is truncated, verify() is a stub, and routes call pending() even though it does not exist. Fixing this directly improves self-improver quality, reliability, and approval flow without expanding the surface area much.

title: Add API key gating and real base URL generation
reason: The product is not monetization-ready if every generation endpoint is publicly callable and asset URLs are inconsistent. Adding optional API key enforcement for paid endpoints and a real base URL improves security, monetization readiness, and downstream output linking with minimal code change.

title: Upgrade product packs with monetization-focused sales assets
reason: The product generator currently creates useful output, but it lacks a stronger sales layer. Adding offer stack, CTA copy, listing copy, and upsell sections improves output quality and makes generated assets more directly monetizable.

steps.replace:
def _bundle_ideas(topic):
    topic_tc = _title_case(topic)
    return [
        f"{topic_tc} Guide + Prompt Pack",
        f"{topic_tc} Guide + Checklist Pack",
        f"{topic_tc} Guide + Template Vault",
        f"{topic_tc} Bundle + Bonus Mini Guide",
        f"{topic_tc} Complete Creator Pack",
    ]


def _sales_angles(topic, buyer, promise):
    promise_text = promise or f"get results with {topic}"
    return [
        f"Built for {buyer.lower()} who want to {promise_text} without wasting weeks on trial and error.",
        f"Position this as a shortcut offer: practical, fast to use, and immediately actionable.",
        f"Lead with transformation, not features: what changes after the buyer uses the pack?",
        f"Use beginner-safe language and emphasize speed, clarity, and simplicity.",
    ]


def _cta_lines(topic):
    return [
        f"Get the {topic} pack now and start executing today.",
        "Use the templates, prompts, and checklist in one focused sitting.",
        "Launch the first version fast, then improve based on buyer response.",
    ]


def _listing_copy(title, buyer, promise, bonus):
    promise_text = promise or "move faster with a clear system"
    bonus_text = bonus or "prompts, templates, and checklists"
    return [
        f"{title} is a practical digital product for {buyer.lower()} who want to {promise_text}.",
        "It is designed to remove confusion and replace it with a cleaner execution path.",
        f"Inside, buyers get implementation guidance plus {bonus_text}.",
        "This is ideal for Gumroad, Stan, Payhip, or a simple landing-page offer.",
    ]


def _add_heading(story, text, style):

title: Improve product and video outputs with stronger CTA and commercial packaging
reason: Generated outputs are currently functional but generic. Strengthening the product pack and YouTube pack with clearer offer framing, tiering, and call-to-action copy improves output quality and monetization readiness immediately, using existing generation paths.

steps.find:
def build_youtube_pack(topic: str, niche: str, tone: str, buyer: str, promise: str, bonus: str, notes: str) -> Dict:
    title = f"{topic.title()} for {buyer} | {promise or 'A Better System'}"
    script = f"""
TITLE:
{title}

THUMBNAIL:
Headline: STOP WASTING TIME ON {topic.upper()}
Subline: {promise or 'A cleaner way to move faster'}
Colors: Black, cyan, white

DESCRIPTION:
A premium long-form YouTube pack for {buyer.lower()} in {niche.lower()}.

STRUCTURE:
1. Hook
2. Why people stay stuck
3. The core shift
4. Framework
5. Mistakes
6. CTA

LONG-FORM SCRIPT:
If you're trying to improve at {topic} and it still feels messy, this video is built to simplify the path.
Most people stay stuck because they collect ideas instead of using a system.
The better move is clarity, repetition, and cleaner execution.

BONUSES:
- {bonus or 'Prompt pack'}
- spin-off shorts
- CTA ideas
- thumbnail variants

NOTES:
{notes or 'Keep it premium and direct.'}
""".strip()

    return {
        "status": "done",
        "mode": "youtube",
        "title": title,
        "script": script,
    }
steps.replace:
def build_youtube_pack(topic: str, niche: str, tone: str, buyer: str, promise: str, bonus: str, notes: str) -> Dict:
    title = f"{topic.title()} for {buyer} | {promise or 'A Better System'}"
    script = f"""
TITLE:
{title}

THUMBNAIL:
Headline: STOP WASTING TIME ON {topic.upper()}
Subline: {promise or 'A cleaner way to move faster'}
Colors: Black, cyan, white

DESCRIPTION:
A premium long-form YouTube pack for {buyer.lower()} in {niche.lower()}.

POSITIONING:
Primary audience: {buyer}
Core promise: {promise or f'Get better results with {topic}'}
Tone: {tone}
Suggested offer: low-ticket digital product + upsell bundle

STRUCTURE:
1. Hook
2. Why people stay stuck
3. The core shift
4. Framework
5. Mistakes
6. CTA

HOOK OPTIONS:
- Most people are making {topic} harder than it needs to be.
- If you have been stuck trying to win with {topic}, this is the reset.
- Here is the cleaner system for {buyer.lower()} who want real momentum.

LONG-FORM SCRIPT:
If you're trying to improve at {topic} and it still feels messy, this video is built to simplify the path.
Most people stay stuck because they collect ideas instead of using a system.
The better move is clarity, repetition, and cleaner execution.
Use one framework, track what works, and turn small wins into a repeatable process.
That is how beginners stop consuming and start compounding results.

CTA IDEAS:
- Download the companion execution pack.
- Grab the prompt bundle linked below.
- Use the checklist and templates to implement this faster.

BONUSES:
- {bonus or 'Prompt pack'}
- spin-off shorts
- CTA ideas
- thumbnail variants

NOTES:
{notes or 'Keep it premium and direct.'}
""".strip()

    return {
        "status": "done",
        "mode": "youtube",
        "title": title,
        "script": script,
    }

Returning offer title, pricing angle, and file URL improves product output quality and makes the system more ready for storefront-style experiences.

def build_product_pack(**kwargs) -> Dict:
    topic = _clean(kwargs.get("topic"), "AI System")
    promise = _clean(kwargs.get("promise"), "get results faster")
    buyer = _clean(kwargs.get("buyer"), "beginners")
    niche = _clean(kwargs.get("niche"), "Make Money Online")
    tone = _clean(kwargs.get("tone"), "Premium")
    bonus = _clean(kwargs.get("bonus"), "prompts, templates, and checklists")
    notes = _clean(kwargs.get("notes"), "")
    base_url = _clean(kwargs.get("base_url"), "")

    title = _premium_title(topic, promise)
    filename = f"{_safe_filename(topic)}_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}.pdf"

    primary_offer = _offer_ideas(topic, buyer, promise)[0]

    styles = getSampleStyleSheet()

title: Fix self-improver execution safety and missing pending API
reason: The self-improver is currently unreliable: routes call a missing pending() function, execute() is visibly truncated, and approval/apply flow can fail silently. Repairing this directly improves self-improver quality, reliability, and safe operator workflow.

title: Add production-safe API metadata and monetization-ready request tracing
reason: The API currently returns an empty base URL and lacks request correlation, which weakens asset links, checkout/readiness, debugging, and user trust. Adding a real base URL resolver plus request IDs improves product output quality, reliability, and monetization readiness without changing core architecture.

@app.post("/api/product-pack")
def product_pack(payload: GenerateRequest):
    job_id = create_job(
        "product",
        payload.model_dump(),
        build_product_pack,
        topic=payload.topic,
        niche=payload.niche,
        tone=payload.tone,
        buyer=payload.buyer,
        promise=payload.promise,
        bonus=payload.bonus,
        notes=payload.notes,
        base_url=get_base_url(),
    )
    return {"job_id": job_id, "status": "queued"}
steps.replace:
@app.post("/api/product-pack")
def product_pack(payload: GenerateRequest, request: Request):
    request_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]
    job_id = create_job(
        "product",
        {**payload.model_dump(), "request_id": request_id},
        build_product_pack,
        topic=payload.topic,
        niche=payload.niche,
        tone=payload.tone,
        buyer=payload.buyer,
        promise=payload.promise,
        bonus=payload.bonus,
        notes=payload.notes,
        base_url=get_base_url(request),
    )
    return {"job_id": job_id, "request_id": request_id, "status": "queued"}

@app.post("/api/shorts-pack")
def shorts_pack(payload: GenerateRequest, request: Request):
    request_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]
    job_id = create_job(
        "shorts",
        {**payload.model_dump(), "request_id": request_id},
        build_shorts_video,
        topic=payload.topic,
        tone=payload.tone,
        promise=payload.promise,
        duration_seconds=payload.duration_seconds,
        base_url=get_base_url(request),
    )
    return {"job_id": job_id, "request_id": request_id, "status": "queued"}

title: Return monetization metadata in gallery for better product browsing
reason: Users currently get a raw file list with no sales-oriented presentation. Adding ready-to-render metadata like file type labels, previews, and downloadable flags improves user flow, perceived product quality, and storefront readiness using the existing gallery endpoint.

title: Fix self-improver execution reliability and missing pending API
reason: The self-improver is currently brittle: routes call a pending() function that does not exist, and execute() is truncated, which can break approvals and application of improvements. Repairing this directly improves self-improver quality, reliability, and safe iteration flow.

title: Add API key gating and production-aware base URL
reason: Core generation endpoints are fully open and get_base_url() always returns an empty string. Adding lightweight API key protection for monetization-sensitive routes and generating a real base URL improves monetization readiness, deployment quality, and downstream output links without requiring a large rewrite.

steps.replace:
from fastapi import FastAPI, Header, HTTPException, Request
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from fastapi.responses import FileResponse
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

@app.post("/api/product-pack")
def product_pack(payload: GenerateRequest, request: Request, x_api_key: str | None = Header(default=None)):
    require_api_key(x_api_key)
    job_id = create_job(
        "product",
        payload.model_dump(),
        build_product_pack,
        topic=payload.topic,
        niche=payload.niche,
        tone=payload.tone,
        buyer=payload.buyer,
        promise=payload.promise,
        bonus=payload.bonus,
        notes=payload.notes,
        base_url=get_base_url(request),
    )
    return {"job_id": job_id, "status": "queued"}


@app.post("/api/shorts-pack")
def shorts_pack(payload: GenerateRequest, request: Request, x_api_key: str | None = Header(default=None)):
    require_api_key(x_api_key)
    job_id = create_job(
        "shorts",
        payload.model_dump(),
        build_shorts_video,
        topic=payload.topic,
        tone=payload.tone,
        promise=payload.promise,
        duration_seconds=payload.duration_seconds,
        base_url=get_base_url(request),
    )
    return {"job_id": job_id, "status": "queued"}


@app.post("/api/youtube-pack")
def youtube_pack(payload: GenerateRequest, x_api_key: str | None = Header(default=None)):
    require_api_key(x_api_key)
    return build_youtube_pack(
        topic=payload.topic,
        niche=payload.niche,
        tone=payload.tone,
        buyer=payload.buyer,
        promise=payload.promise,
        bonus=payload.bonus,
        notes=payload.notes,
    )

title: Make gallery and job responses more user-ready with direct preview metadata
reason: Users need a clearer post-generation flow after creation. Adding preview/download URLs and lightweight type labels to gallery output improves browsing and conversion to usable assets, while staying realistic within the current API structure.

title: Add API key gate and proper base URL generation
reason: The current API is fully open with wildcard CORS and blank file URLs, which hurts monetization readiness and product delivery. A lightweight API key gate for paid-generation endpoints plus environment-aware base URL generation makes the system safer to expose and easier to integrate into a paid frontend.

title: Upgrade gallery into a conversion-ready output index
reason: Generated assets are monetizable, but the current gallery only exposes raw files. Adding previews, file categories, and direct download URLs improves user flow, perceived product quality, and storefront readiness without needing a new service.

title: Add typed self-improver API validation and proposal browsing
reason: Current self-improver routes accept raw dicts and always return success on approve/reject, which hurts reliability and operator flow. Adding schema validation and a full proposal list endpoint makes proposals safer, easier to review, and more usable for a monetizable admin workflow.

title: Upgrade API output metadata for better frontend flow and monetization readiness
reason: The generation endpoints currently only return queued job IDs and use an empty base URL. Adding environment-based public URLs plus gallery filters and counts makes generated assets easier to present in a product UI, improves customer flow, and supports paid delivery pages and sharing.

steps.find:
def get_base_url() -> str:
    return ""
steps.replace:
def get_base_url() -> str:
    return (os.getenv("PUBLIC_BASE_URL") or os.getenv("BASE_URL") or "").rstrip("/")
